content.en:
The fate of the Canghe realm?

Ye Tian was a little surprised, he was just going to save the Lord of Xuanchen, and then asked about the situation in this area, but he didn't expect an accident.

"Lord of Xuanchen, I'm not here for the opportunity of the Canghe Realm, but I'm a little interested now, can you tell me a word or two?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Of course, it's all easy to hear!"

The Lord of Xuanchen immediately informed Ye Tian about the situation of the Canghe Realm.

It turned out that somewhere in this area, a special world Canghe Realm was born.

This world is incomparably special, the personality is very low, and the creatures in it are extremely weak.

However, this world has given birth to a resource that makes countless bone transformation realms excited.

Canghe Pearl!

Canghe Zhu is an incomparably precious resource, which can help the Heavenly Ancestors of the Bone Transformation Realm break through the realm and complete the immeasurable bone transformation.

Therefore, many bone transformation realms that have fallen into a bottleneck want to obtain Canghe beads.

......

"Lord of Xuanchen, we can't really enter the Canghe Realm in these bone transformation realms?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!" the Lord of Xuanchen nodded, "We can't enter, there have been eight Bone Transformation Realm existences who tried to forcibly break into the Canghe Realm, but failed! Moreover, except for Canghe Zhu, the other resources are very ordinary, and they are the kind of resources that only weak cultivators need, and they are useless to us. "

"Then how do we get the Canghe Pearl?"

Ye Tian was puzzled.

"Need the Eternal Boundary Stone!" said the Lord of Xuanchen, "This treasure can allow one of our wills to be reincarnated into the Canghe Realm and occupy the body of a weak creature. In normal times, the Canghe Realm was in a closed stage, and no amount of Eternal Boundary Boundary Stones would be useless. But now that the rules of the Canghe Realm are in the open period, it has attracted many Bone Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors. "

"Eternal Boundary Stone, where can I get it?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Endless Lord, you saved me, I'll give you an Eternal Boundary Stone!" The Lord of Xuanchen took out an Eternal Transformation Stone and handed it to Ye Tian.

"Thank you!"

Ye Tian thanked.

"This thing is not very precious, it's just that if you want to buy the Eternal Boundary Stone now, you can only go to the distant Eternal Ancient Demon City, which will delay for a while. It just so happens that I also have a few more Eternal Boundary Stones, which are useless. The Lord of Xuanchen said with a smile.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian and the Lord of Xuanchen went to the Canghe Realm together.

Mainly, he doesn't know the road either.

......

At the beginning, Ye Tian hadn't seen many cultivators on the road.

After approaching the Canghe Realm, you can occasionally encounter cultivators in the Bone Transformation Realm.

Of course, there are also some bone transformation realms of special blood transformation realm races, similar to the Lord of the Ruins.

"It seems that the cultivator's power is very strong in the land of the Eternal Shore!"

Ye Tian guessed.

The bone transformation realms that can walk on the other side of eternity are all very powerful, and the weakest ones are afraid that they all have five bone transformation realms, otherwise they will not survive at all.

Like the Lord of Xuanchen, if it weren't for the Canghe Pearl, he wanted to break through to the Sixth Bone Transformation Realm, otherwise he wouldn't dare to walk on the other side of eternity.

Because the land beyond Eternity is too dangerous, and if you are not careful, you will be killed by some powerful eternal true beast.

Along.

Ye Tian and the Lord of Xuanchen also encountered several Eternal True Beasts, but they were all solved by Ye Tian.

As a result, they did not encounter any major problems.

"The land on the other side of eternity is still too dangerous, I hope I can get a Canghe Pearl this time!"

The Lord of Xuanchen sighed.

"Lord of Dust, have you rarely entered the land of eternity before?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Very little!" said the Lord of Xuanchen, "In the past, I had at most teamed up with other Bone Transformation Realms to roam the nearby territory. But this time, the Canghe Realm was relatively far away, and those few Bone Transformation Realms were not willing to come over. The main reason is that it is too difficult to obtain Canghe Pearl, and the chance of success is very slim. But I'm trapped in the Five Bone Transformation Realm for countless primeval eras, so I have to take a risk. To be honest, although I know a lot about this territory, it's the first time I've come this far!"

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

A little more passed.

"The Canghe Realm has arrived!"

The Lord of Xuan Chen said excitedly.

......

Outside the Canghe boundary.

One bone transformation realm after another came here, and many of them were six bone transformation realms, and even seven bone transformation realms.

As for the Eight Bone Transformation Realm, they didn't come here.

First of all, Canghe Zhu was useless against the eight bone transformation realms and the nine bone transformation realms.

Occasionally, there will be eight bone transformation realms to come here, also for their juniors.

However.

Using the Eternal Boundary Boundary Stone to reincarnate into the Canghe Realm, even if it is an eight-time bone transformation realm, there is no advantage.

Therefore, the Heavenly Ancestors of the Eight Bone Transformation Realm rarely came to the Canghe Realm to seek opportunities.

Now.

Among these bone transformation realms, Ye Tian's cultivation of the three bone transformation realms can be said to be very inconspicuous.

Even if he was an primordial-level genius, no bone transformation realm would pay attention to him.

After all, no matter how powerful the Three Bone Transformation Realm Ancient Geniuses were, they were not as good as the Sixth Bone Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors!

Moreover, this time there were also seven Bone Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors.

"Lord of Xuanchen, can't you enter the Canghe Realm now?"

Ye Tianchuan asked.

"Not yet!" "Not yet!" the Lord of Xuanchen introduced: "The Canghe Realm is still in a semi-closed state, and it is only when the black lines outside the Canghe Realm dissipate before it is time to enter." "

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian said he knew.

As time passed, more and more bone transformation realms came here, and there was no conflict between them.

Finally.

The black lines outside the Canghe Boundary began to dissipate.

At this time, the transformation of the bone-bone began to prepare.

It's been another time.

The black veins completely dissipated, which meant that the Canghe Realm was completely open, and the Eternal Transformation Stone could be used to reincarnate a will into the Canghe Realm.

Whoa!!!

One of the Bone Transformation Realms took out the Eternal Boundary Stone, and they all fused a will into this Eternal Boundary Stone.

Rumble!!!!

The Eternal Transformation Stone burst out of energy, penetrating the Canghe Realm with this will, and began to randomly reincarnate into the body of a weak creature.

"I'll start too!"

Ye Tian also took out the Eternal Boundary Stone.

Airplanes!!!!

The Eternal Boundary Stone carried one of his wills into the Canghe Realm and began to be reincarnated.

And the process after that, he can't control it, who he is reincarnated against, that's a matter of chance.

Even if you're unlucky, it's possible to transfer to a woman.

Rumble!!!!

Reincarnation is complete.

Ye Tian's will awakened, and he sensed that he occupied a weak body.

Instantly, he opened his eyes and looked around.
